title: Phase 1: Deploy jarvis-onshape-mcp on nativedev with SSE + per-user systemd
description: Clone jarvis-onshape-mcp v1.2.0, install via uv, deploy as systemd template service onshape-mcp@.service in SSE mode (port 3000+ pool). Per-user API keys in ~/.config/onshape-mcp/<user>.env. Bootstrap tommaso from existing onshape-cadgen keys. Expose via Tailscale Funnel on port 10001.
acceptance_criteria: Service running for tommaso. curl https://nativedev.tail7d3518.ts.net:10001/sse returns SSE stream. /etc/onshape-mcp/users.toml created.

title: Phase 5: Real benchmark suite tests/benchmark_onshape_mcp.py
description: 5 prompts × N=5 runs comparing iframe-legacy vs Claude Code+Jarvis MCP. Wall-clock prompt→regen via Onshape currentmicroversion polling. Median ± p95 report in tests/reports/.

title: Phase 3: Skill consolidation — deprecate CadQuery skills, add onshape-design-assistant
description: Move cadquery-codegen, cadquery-validate, openscad-* to skills/_legacy/. Rewrite 3d-print-orchestrator → onshape-design-assistant SKILL.md. Update CLAUDE.md cardinal rules.

title: Phase 2: Client setup docs + mcp-remote bridge config
description: Document client-side mcp.json snippet using npx mcp-remote bridge. Verify /mcp lists ~60 onshape tools. Create CLIENT-SETUP.md.

title: Phase 4: Deprecate iframe extension (move backend+frontend to legacy/)
description: systemctl disable onshape-cadgen, move onshape-extension/{backend,frontend} → onshape-extension/legacy/. Add legacy/README.md explaining deprecation.
